concerns: Button transitions in button.css must include a @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) override — CLAUDE.md lists reduced motion support as a non-negotiable accessibility requirement, and shell.css already sets this precedent
Step 1 references 'shell.css' alongside tokens.css and global.css implying src/styles/ — shell.css actually lives at src/layout/shell.css, ensure the correct path is read

Plan adds heading styles (h1-h4) in global.css, but shell.css already styles h1 inside .shell-header with font-size and weight — global h1 rules could conflict or override; keep global heading styles generic and ensure .shell-header h1 specificity still wins
--font-weight-bold at 600 is technically semi-bold (700 is bold per CSS spec) — either use 700 or rename the token to --font-weight-semibold to avoid misleading consumers
